title: Salat for every night of Ramadan

duas.title: Salat for every night of Ramadan
duas.description:
In the margin of al-Balad al-Amin, al-Kaf`ami has reported on the authority of Sayyid Ibn Baqi that it is recommended to offer a
Two unit prayer every night in month of Ramadan, in each unit

Surah al-Fatihah once and Surah al-Tawhid three times.

After salat, it is recommended to say the following:

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ مَنْ هُوَ حَفِيظٌ لاَ يَغْفُلُ
segments.transliteration: subhana man huwa hafizun la yaghfulu
segments.translation: Glory be to Him Who watches over, never leaves anything undone, or is neglectful.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ مَنْ هُوَ رَحِيمٌ لاَ يَعْجَلُ
segments.transliteration: subhana man huwa rahimun la ya`jalu
segments.translation: Glory be to Him Who is Merciful, never does a thing in haste.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ مَنْ هُوَ قَائِمٌ لاَ يَسْهُو
segments.transliteration: subhana man huwa qa'imun la yas-hu
segments.translation: Glory be to Him Who is vigilant, never forgets one thing over another.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ مَنْ هُوَ دَائِمٌ لاَ يَلْهُو
segments.transliteration: subhana man huwa da'imun la yalhu
segments.translation: Glory be to Him Who is alert and steady, never is engrossed with a thing so as to overlook another.
All glory be to Allah, all praise be to Allah,

segments.arabic: وَلاَ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ ٱللَّهُ وَٱللَّهُ أَكْبَرُ
segments.transliteration: wa la ilaha illa allahu wallahu akbaru
segments.translation: there is no god save Allah, and Allah is the Greatest

duas.title: Istegfar and Salawat
duas.description: Then, it is recommended to say the following imploration for forgiveness:<hr> Followed by Salawat 10 times

segments.translation: Glory be to You! Glory be to You! Glory be to You!

segments.arabic: يَا عَظِيمُ ٱغْفِرْ لِيَ ٱلذَّنْبَ ٱلْعَظِيمَ
segments.translation: O All-great, forgive my grave sins.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَعَلَىٰ آلِهِ
segments.translation: O Allah, (please do) send blessings to Muhammad and upon his Household.

_index_meta.title: Salat for every night of Ramadan
